title: Universal Tool 100 Pack Black Stretch Cord with Black Ball 8 Inch Length
description:
Keep you gear and equipment secure and organized with the Universal Tool 100pk of Black Stretch Cords! This set of stretch bungee cords are constructed of natural rubber with a polypropylene cover, and feature durable plastic balls to tie down canopies, boat covers, fishing poles and more. Each cord is 8" in length. These multi-purpose stretch cords will come in handy time and time again, so make sure you keep this pack of 100 in your garage, camping gear, boat or car!
